template.name: Template Monitoramento Logs PIX
template.description: Monitoramento de logs de aplicacoes PIX nos servidores c-ado-svprd119 e c-ado-svprd120. Inclui contagem de ocorrencias nos alertas.

item.name: Log PIX - SPI-Dict-Worker Claims
item.key: logrt["D:\SPI-Dict-Worker\claims\logs\log.*\.log","(The server was not found or was not accessible|The semaphore timeout period has expired|The request was canceled due to the configured HttpClient\.Timeout of 5 seconds elapsing)"]

trigger.expression: count(/Template Monitoramento Logs PIX/logrt["D:\SPI-Dict-Worker\claims\logs\log.*\.log","(The server was not found or was not accessible|The semaphore timeout period has expired|The request was canceled due to the configured HttpClient\.Timeout of 5 seconds elapsing)"],10m,"like","The server was not found or was not accessible")>0
